gitCommit.subject: Security Sync (#1848)
gitCommit.body:
Security Sync (#1848)

* Add security sync workflow for Jira and AWS integration

* Test actions

* Update GitHub token in securitysync workflow

* Update Jira token in securitysync.yml

* Modify Jira username and custom fields for sync

Updated Jira username and custom fields in securitysync.yml.

* Update securitysync workflow triggers and permissions

* Disable manual trigger and schedule in securitysync.yml

Comment out manual trigger and schedule for security sync workflow.

* Fix typo in jira-assignee value

* Change JIRA assignee from DFB0 to DSFV

* Update securitysync.yml to enable manual and scheduled runs

---------

Co-authored-by: Nathan O'Donnell <nodonnell@collabralink.com>
